rulings.Case Title: JOHN COYLE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Tishman Construction Corporation Of California To Produce Its Custodian(S) Of Records, Person(S) Most Knowledgeable And Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, July 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel Defendant Tishman Construction to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable and produce documents at deposition is continued to August 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 at the request of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BRIAN ROBERTS et al VS. ALFA LAVAL INC SUED INDIVIDUALLLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Glenda Robert'S Further Responses To Its Requests For Admissions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, July 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Rockwell Automation¿s motion to compel Glenda Roberts¿ further responses to requests for admissions 42, 46, 48, 49, 51 53, 56-59 and 61 is granted. Plaintiff¿s responses that she filed lawsuits and that she alleges that the decedent was exposed to asbestos attributable to the entity named in the requests is not responsive. By July 13 plaintiff must admit or deny that decedent was exposed to asbestos attributable to the entities named in the requests or state that after a reasonable investigation that she lacks sufficient information to admit or deny. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GERALD R. WILMOT et al VS. ACE HARDWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Leave To Take Subsequent Deposition Of Plaintiff Gerald Wilmot
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, July 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant CalPortland Company¿s motion for leave to take subsequent deposition of Plaintiff Gerald Wilmot is granted. Mr. Wilmot shall make himself available for an in-person deposition not to exceed one hour to be taken by CalPortland at a mutually agreeably time and place. = (220/HEK)
